risk: component_of_dataset_id=Blank would display as a real value and conflict with the intended empty-cell meaning.
recommendation: Use empty string for no parent, not the word Blank.

risk: Half the planned rows would add Unclear counting fields, which may not improve the primary table and may imply unresolved overlap is now formally modeled.
recommendation: Keep these in review CSVs until source/sample-ID review resolves more rows.

risk: cohort_overlap_audit and ibd200_overlap_review already say DS026/DS059 and DS027/DS057 should not be independently counted together, while first_pass_plan leaves them Unclear.
recommendation: Reconcile plan against existing overlap reviews before primary CSV patch.

risk: count_as_independent_cohort=TRUE may be read as independent from all related resources, but these are source cohorts reused by integrated atlases.
recommendation: Use overlap_notes to say count once as source dataset; do not count again through integrated resources.

risk: CSV parser will tolerate extra columns, but users will not see them unless site-tables.js/datasets.qmd are updated. If hidden, primary CSV change has little utility.
recommendation: Add UI labels/detail display before or with schema patch.

risk: curation-methods.qmd already says use audit files for de-duplicated counts, but primary columns would create a second source of truth.
recommendation: Update docs to define precedence: primary fields are summary flags; review CSVs remain evidence ledger.

risk: Applying data/cohort_family_first_pass_plan.csv as-is would expose provisional cohort-counting semantics before value conventions and UI support are ready.
recommendation: Do not apply as-is. Keep the plan as a staging artifact, correct the Blank convention, reconcile with overlap audits, and add primary CSV columns with UI/detail-table support in one controlled patch.
